title_ja: 2×2グリッド・親密な熱気・グラムフォト（汗ばんだツヤ肌）
title_en: 2x2 grid, intimate desire glamour, sweaty glossy skin, warm indoor flash
reference_note: English: prompt_en.md. 2x2 grid layout, completely unguarded expression, slightly sweaty glossy skin.

subject.description: A miniature visual narrative of desire and seduction through four different cinematic compositions in a 2x2 grid. The subject appears completely unguarded and deeply infatuated.

expression.eyes: Soft alluring gaze, deeply infatuated, unguarded
expression.overall: Intimate desire, female pheromones, completely unguarded

face.note_when_no_reference: Clear skin, flushed cheeks, slightly sweaty glossy sheen, dewy finish

skin.texture: Slightly sweaty, glossy sheen, flushed and warm

pose.overall: Four different cinematic compositions capturing intimacy and surrender

layered_from_skin_outward: Thin silk or lace slip dress, slightly slipping off one shoulder (tasteful glamour)

photography.texture: Glossy skin texture, cinematic film grain
photography.lighting: Ambiguous warm indoor lighting mixed with a late-night flash photography aesthetic
photography.depth_of_field: Shallow depth of field on the background, sharp focus on the glossy skin and eyes

background.setting: Ambiguous warm indoor space (e.g., dim bedroom or lounge)
background.lighting: Low ambient light with warm pools

must_keep: 2x2 grid composition in a single image
Identical facial features across all 4 panels
avoid_as_positive_style: Not explicit nudity (keep it tasteful glamour)
Not a collage of separate photos (must be a clean grid)
